pass_conditions: The input range has an owning region, scalar role, or explicit external/source role.
The output visually belongs to the same calculation story as its formula or pivot inputs.
failure_signals: Input/output relation crosses unrelated visual sections without formula or hierarchy evidence.
Input range points to a hidden or uncaptured region that cannot be reviewed.

pass_conditions: Each workbook_range input is mapped to an existing cell region or explicitly remains a scalar/reference cell.
If the input should be part of a nearby region, the region boundary is expanded or split deterministically.
failure_signals: A formula input has no owning cell region after capture and boundary review.
The captured visual block contradicts the current input-region mapping.

pass_conditions: The input range has an owning region, scalar role, or explicit external/source role.
The output visually belongs to the same calculation story as its formula or pivot inputs.
failure_signals: Input/output relation crosses unrelated visual sections without formula or hierarchy evidence.
Input range points to a hidden or uncaptured region that cannot be reviewed.

pass_conditions: Each workbook_range input is mapped to an existing cell region or explicitly remains a scalar/reference cell.
If the input should be part of a nearby region, the region boundary is expanded or split deterministically.
failure_signals: A formula input has no owning cell region after capture and boundary review.
The captured visual block contradicts the current input-region mapping.

parser_observations.message: Cross-validation targets prioritize render capture and deterministic visual/formula gates. They are a review plan, not evidence that capture has already happened.
